truth_boundaries.source_of_truth: runtime route tests and apply/admission code remain authoritative

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: redacted public node status only; grants no authority

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Read-only public launch capability matrix; does not activate or disable consensus rules by itself.
vectors.privacy_boundary: public guardrail status only; does not activate disabled features

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Returns unauthenticated diagnostic status when headers are absent and scoped session status only when valid session headers are present; not a generic state snapshot.
vectors.privacy_boundary: session introspection must not become generic public account state

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Activity inbox is derived only from publicly inspectable protocol events: mentions, replies, group invitations, moderation notices, dispute assignments, governance notices, and validator/operator alerts.
vectors.privacy_boundary: public activity inbox is derived from public protocol events and contains no sealed user-to-user thread semantics

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Async PoH my-cases is viewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.
vectors.privacy_boundary: viewer-scoped PoH case queue; private evidence is not public

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Async PoH case reads are public/private hybrid read models; private evidence is included only for authorized applicant or assigned reviewer sessions.
vectors.privacy_boundary: public case reads redact private evidence unless applicant/reviewer session is authorized

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: WebRTC signal reads are live-session participant scoped and must not be indexed as generic public snapshots.
vectors.privacy_boundary: transport-only signal queue visible only to the live-room participant

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: PoH operator routes are environment-disabled and operator-token gated. They enqueue deterministic system txs only and do not grant public validator authority, public PoH finalization authority, or decentralized reviewer consensus by themselves.
vectors.privacy_boundary: operator helper route enqueues deterministic system txs only; no public validator authority

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Relay submit stores transport envelopes only. It does not submit chain transactions or grant consensus authority.
vectors.privacy_boundary: relay transport is not validator or consensus authority

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: public ingress rejects SYSTEM and receipt-only submissions

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: readiness does not reveal authority secrets or grant production posture

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: health is liveness metadata only

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Operator status is diagnostic posture evidence and must not be treated as authority-granting.
vectors.privacy_boundary: operator diagnostics are posture evidence and never grant role authority

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: consensus status exposes redacted diagnostics only; it does not enable BFT signing

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: forensics are bounded diagnostics and not peer secrets

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: mempool size and diagnostics are visible, while pending transaction detail stays bounded by public-route redaction rules

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Testnet capability status is a launch-matrix-bound claim-control surface. It reports completed mechanisms and disabled high-risk capabilities but grants no validator, economic, helper, upgrade, legal, or public beta authority.
vectors.privacy_boundary: claim-control surface only; it cannot enable validators, economics, helper execution, or upgrades

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: chain identity is public trust-anchor metadata only

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: chain head is public progress metadata only

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Account operator-status is a derived readiness/responsibility read model. It is not validator promotion, not proof of public validator readiness, and grants no authority.
vectors.privacy_boundary: derived readiness only; not validator promotion or helper/storage assignment authority

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: peer status is redacted topology data and not a trust anchor by itself

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: storage/IPFS ops status does not assign storage work or reveal private evidence

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: helper readiness is diagnostic only; production helper execution remains disabled

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: readiness diagnostics do not permit observer or inactive-validator block production

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: tx lifecycle is status-only and must not expose private evidence payloads

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: dispute current queue is bounded read model; assignment still requires exact lane consent

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: accepting dispute work requires assigned juror status and active dispute reviewer responsibility

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Tier-2 my-cases is viewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.
vectors.privacy_boundary: Tier-2 case queues are viewer-scoped and evidence-sensitive

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Live my-cases is account-scoped and requires authenticated viewer alignment.
vectors.privacy_boundary: live PoH queues are viewer-scoped and grant no room authority without participation

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Account operator-status is a derived readiness/responsibility read model. It is not validator promotion, not proof of public validator readiness, and grants no authority.
vectors.privacy_boundary: operator status exposes readiness blockers, not private authority secrets

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: chain manifest is a trust anchor and cannot grant validator authority

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: state-root reads expose commitment metadata only

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: attestation submission is not available to observers or inactive validators

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: eligible dispute work cannot be assigned without exact dispute_review opt-in

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: accepting dispute work requires exact active lane consent

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: PoH Tier-2 request skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.
vectors.privacy_boundary: legacy Tier-2 skeleton helpers are removed; direct signed tx submission remains authoritative

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Network peer diagnostics are not generic public state snapshots.
vectors.privacy_boundary: peer view is redacted and never leaks validator secrets

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Observer reconcile is transport/status bookkeeping and grants no validator authority.
vectors.privacy_boundary: observer reconciliation never grants validator signing authority

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: eligibility reads are bounded reputation summaries and do not assign duties

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: economics status must keep live transfers/rewards disabled before launch

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: treasury status does not enable spend before launch gates

vectors.contract_truth_boundary: Contract inventory only; runtime code remains the authority for validation and mutation.
vectors.privacy_boundary: wallet reads do not imply live economics or transfer activation

final_testnet_go_gate_required: run full pytest suite in repo venv
run artifact freshness gates with --require-git-tracked inside real git checkout
run external multi-machine validator rehearsal with independent operators or containers
run storage/IPFS durability rehearsal against real daemon/operator topology
review legal/compliance docs with counsel before public token/governance claims
publish launch-disabled matrix and capability surface with public beta candidate docs

automatic_protocol_upgrade_apply.disabled_reason: Protocol upgrades are record-only until signed artifact distribution, staging, migration, and rollback are implemented.
automatic_protocol_upgrade_apply.truth_boundary: Launch matrix is a conservative guardrail; runtime apply/admission code remains authoritative.

live_economics.disabled_reason: Live economics requires lock expiry, governance activation, legal/compliance review, accounting proof, and public testnet rehearsal.
live_economics.truth_boundary: Launch matrix is a conservative guardrail; runtime apply/admission code remains authoritative.

live_rewards.disabled_reason: Issuance policy is implemented, but live rewards remain locked until economics activation and accounting proof.
live_rewards.truth_boundary: Launch matrix is a conservative guardrail; runtime apply/admission code remains authoritative.

live_transfers.disabled_reason: Transfers are implemented but locked until economics activation is canonical and public claims are safe.
live_transfers.truth_boundary: Launch matrix is a conservative guardrail; runtime apply/admission code remains authoritative.

production_helper_execution.disabled_reason: Production helper execution requires serial-equivalence and multi-node Byzantine helper tests.
production_helper_execution.truth_boundary: Launch matrix is a conservative guardrail; runtime apply/admission code remains authoritative.

public_multi_validator_bft.disabled_reason: Public multi-validator BFT requires adversarial convergence, churn, partition/rejoin, equivocation, and restart/replay evidence.
public_multi_validator_bft.truth_boundary: Launch matrix is a conservative guardrail; runtime apply/admission code remains authoritative.

public_validator_join.disabled_reason: Public validator promotion requires separate external multi-validator proof and operator readiness gates.
public_validator_join.truth_boundary: Launch matrix is a conservative guardrail; runtime apply/admission code remains authoritative.

treasury_spend.disabled_reason: Treasury spending requires economics activation and treasury governance/public accountability proof.
treasury_spend.truth_boundary: Launch matrix is a conservative guardrail; runtime apply/admission code remains authoritative.

public_beta_blocker_report.next_allowed_claim: controlled private testnet candidate with public-beta blocker evidence gates present

remaining_unclaimed_after_mechanism_comp: public beta readiness until final go-gate evidence is captured
public validator/BFT readiness until independent multi-machine proof passes
live economics until lock, governance, legal, wallet, treasury, and adversarial economics gates pass
automatic protocol upgrades until signed staging becomes deterministic migration/rollback execution in a future audited batch
production helper execution until real block-path multi-node Byzantine helper proof passes
